patterns.workflow_pattern: GitHub Actions workflows use actions/checkout@v4, dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable, and Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
patterns.ci_pattern: Existing workflows (repo-health.yml, release.yml) run on cloud runners (macos-latest) and use 'make check' for validation
patterns.badge_pattern: README.md starts with a title line, badges should be added after the title

existing_implementations.description: repo-health.yml already implements proper CI on macos-latest, running make check and policy checks. release.yml runs on macos-latest for building releases.

issues_found.ai-coding-job.yml: Requires self-hosted runner with bop daemon - dead without dedicated infrastructure, triggers on PR label events but does nothing useful in GHA cloud
